what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for a JPEG image asset named p-10 in the design-source channel under capital-raise, declaring its id, address, blob URI, MIME type, source label, authoring session, creation timestamp, and a short human-readable source note.
observations: YAML frontmatter wraps all asset metadata
The asset is an image/jpeg but width and height are both 0
Blob reference uses a blob://b2:... URI with a hash
Source is explicitly marked as design_source_material
Body text states 'SOURCE design ground-truth — capital-raise/p-10.jpg'
standouts: Image dimensions are recorded as 0 despite being an image file
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a fixed set of ledger fields
Includes a short plain-text source note after the frontmatter
concerns: Width and height are 0, which is unusual for an image record and may indicate missing extraction
links is empty, so no cross-references or provenance edges are captured
The blob hash cannot be verified from within this file
notes: A sparse metadata stub for a design-source image asset, useful for identity and storage reference but lacking dimensions and linked context.
questions: Why are the image width and height 0?
What visual content does capital-raise/p-10.jpg contain?
Where exactly is the blob stored and how is it validated?
How is this image intended to be used in the capital-raise context?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to record design ground-truth metadata for an image asset; the file does that, but the missing dimensions mean the record is incomplete.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to catalog a specific design-source image with a stable identity, storage pointer, and authorship context so it can be located and trusted as source material.
novelty: The explicit 'design ground-truth' label and blob://b2 content-addressed URI are the most distinctive elements.
contribution: A concrete, identity-stable metadata record that preserves where an image is stored, who authored it, when it was created, and its role as design source material, which a fused system can use to resolve and attribute the asset.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata file for the JPEG image p-10 in the design-source capital-raise channel, recording its id, blob URI, MIME type, authoring session, creation time, and a design ground-truth source note, with width and height set to 0 and no links.
intention_for_embedding: This file was created to catalog and preserve provenance for a design-source image asset used in the capital-raise context.
